import json, os, pprint, sys, math, re, unicodedata, difflib

# Load files
import json, io, os, re, unicodedata, difflib
quran_path = '/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json'
hadith_path = '/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json'

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)

(len(quran_data), type(quran_data), len(hadith_data), type(hadith_data))

# Utility functions for Arabic normalization
import re, unicodedata

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel_re = re.compile(r'[\u0640]')
punc_re = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]')

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = str(s)
    # Normalize Arabic letters
    s = s.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا')
    s = s.replace('ى', 'ي').replace('ئ', 'ي').replace('ؤ', 'و')
    s = s.replace('ٱ', 'ا')  # alif wasla to alif if appears
    s = s.replace('ة', 'ه')
    # Remove diacritics
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # Remove tatweel
    s = tatweel_re.sub('', s)
    # Remove punctuation
    s = punc_re.sub(' ', s)
    # Collapse spaces and lowercase
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

orig_span = "إِنَّمَا أَنَا بَشَرٌ مِثْلُكُمْ يُرْسِلُنِي الرَّحْمَٰنُ مُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا"
norm_orig = normalize_arabic(orig_span)
norm_orig

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming O(n*m)
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [ [0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1) ]
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j-1]+1
            else:
                dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j] if dp[i-1][j] >= dp[i][j-1] else dp[i][j-1]
    return dp[n][m]

def normalized_lcs(a, b):
    # Use normalization by length of longer string
    la, lb = len(a), len(b)
    if la==0 or lb==0:
        return 0.0
    l = lcs_length(a, b)
    return l / max(la, lb), l/ min(la, lb), l/ la, l/ lb

# Compare orig_norm against candidate normalized text
candidates = matches  # 18:110 & 41:6
norm_cands = [ (v, normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text'])) for v in candidates ]
norm_orig = normalize_arabic(orig_span)

scores = []
for v, nc in norm_cands:
    scores.append( (v['surah_name'], v['ayah_id'], normalized_lcs(nc, norm_orig), nc) )
scores

cand2_list = search_quran('وَمَا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ إِلَّا مُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا')
cand2_list

candidates2 = []
norm_orig = normalize_arabic(orig_span)
for v in cand2_list:
    nc= normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text'])
    candidates2.append((v['surah_name'], v['ayah_id'], normalized_lcs(nc, norm_orig), nc))
candidates2

def tokens(s):
    return normalize_arabic(s).split()

def token_f1(a, b):
    ta, tb = tokens(a), tokens(b)
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    # multiset counts
    from collections import Counter
    ca, cb = Counter(ta), Counter(tb)
    # intersection count
    inter = sum(min(ca[t], cb.get(t,0)) for t in ca)
    precision = inter/len(ta)
    recall = inter/len(tb)
    if precision+recall==0:
        f1=0
    else:
        f1 = 2*precision*recall / (precision+recall)
    return f1, precision, recall, inter, len(ta), len(tb)

orig = orig_span

candidates_all = matches + cand2_list + search_quran('إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ شَاهِدًا وَمُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا') + search_quran('إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ شَاهِدًا وَمُبَشِّرًا') + search_quran('شَاهِدًا وَمُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا')

seen=set()
score_list=[]
for v in candidates_all:
    key=(v['surah_name'], v['ayah_id'])
    if key in seen: 
        continue
    seen.add(key)
    f1, p, r, inter, la, lb = token_f1(v['ayah_text'], orig)
    lcsmax, lcsmin, lcs_a, lcs_b = normalized_lcs(normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text']), normalize_arabic(orig))
    score_list.append((key, f1, p, r, inter, la, lb, lcsmax, lcsmin))
sorted(score_list, key=lambda x: (-x[1], -x[7]))[:10]

cand_18_110 = [v for v in quran_data if v['surah_name']=='الكهف' and v['ayah_id']==110][0]['ayah_text']
cand_18_110

cand_41_6 = [v for v in quran_data if v['surah_name']=='فصلت' and v['ayah_id']==6][0]['ayah_text']
cand_41_6
search_quran('قُلْ إِنَّمَا يُوحَىٰ إِلَيَّ أَنَّمَا إِلَـٰهُكُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ وَاحِدٌ')
